status_detail: Block verification could NOT be completed for gamma.app due to test harness limitation, NOT a gamma-side issue. Five distinct input strategies were attempted: (v2) Tab-then-SendKeys typing, (v3) center-click + Ctrl+A + Del + paste, (v4) triple-click at precise textarea pixel coordinates (950,540), (autofocus) paste-only without click, (tab_navigation) 12 Tab presses to cycle focus then paste. In ALL cases the final screenshot showed gamma.app's textarea containing one of its rotating placeholder example prompts ('유기농 개 사료 만드는 스타트업을 위한 피치 데크', '세계에서 가장 아름다운 일일 하이킹', '수론에서의 고급 주제') — never our test prompt. Chrome's browser-wide Ctrl+A consistently highlighted the ENTIRE page body rather than the textarea, confirming synthetic Windows mouse_event clicks are not giving focus to gamma's React contenteditable input. gamma.app implements a non-standard rich-text input that requires JS-level focus/insertion, which is unreachable from PowerShell SendKeys/mouse_event. The h2_end_stream=2 fix effect cannot be verified through UI automation alone - HTTP-level testing or CDP is required.
notes_for_dev: CRITICAL test harness gap discovered. Two other services in this batch (#502 huggingface, #503 baidu) were successfully validated via 'autofocus_paste' (simple Ctrl+V after page load works because their chat inputs auto-focus). gamma.app does NOT auto-focus its textarea and synthetic mouse clicks cannot focus its React contenteditable. RECOMMENDED test harness upgrade: restart Chrome with --remote-debugging-port=9222, then test-pc-worker can use CDP Runtime.evaluate to run: `let t=document.querySelector('textarea'); t.focus(); document.execCommand('insertText',false,PROMPT); t.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent('keydown',{key:'Enter'}));`. Alternative: send a HAR-derived HTTP POST directly to gamma's generation API with the prompt payload, check for 200/block status in response — this independently validates the APF block without depending on UI automation. Given #502 and #503 validated h2_end_stream=2 block behavior, the fix almost certainly also works for gamma but needs a different verification method.
retry_context: Retry of #497 after reload_services re-executed and h2_end_stream=2 confirmed. Retry blocked by test harness limitation, not by service behavior.
cross_service_context: Retry batch (501/502/503): #502 huggingface shows BLOCKED_SILENT_RESET (prompt reached service, empty chat = APF blocked response), #503 baidu shows BLOCKED_NO_RENDER (user message visible, stuck at 理解问题 = APF blocked response). Both confirm h2_end_stream=2 fix works. gamma (#501) only fails due to input automation limits.
